title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Haier India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Haier India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Haier India Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Haier India Holdings Services:
Haier India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haier India Holdings Services!
